pages.title: Pool Duel
pages.description:
Line up precise shots to pocket balls using timing-based cue strikes in a straightforward pool format. Players adjust aiming angles and power to sink balls into pockets aiming for higher scores. The game offers various table layouts that increase shot difficulty and requires steady hand control to clear each rack efficiently.

Key Features

• Timing-based cue striking  
• Adjustable aiming mechanics  
• Progressive difficulty tables  
• Score tracking system  
• Classic pool table settings

pages.title: Pool Merge
pages.description:
Merge colored pool balls by swiping tiles to create larger numbered spheres and clear the board. The core mechanic revolves around strategically combining matching balls to optimize space and score, with each move requiring careful planning to avoid running out of moves. Progression depends on unlocking higher level merges and managing limited grid space.

Key Features

• Tile swiping merge mechanics  
• Strategic spatial ball management  
• Level advancement by score thresholds  
• Limited move planning challenge  
• Casual pool-themed puzzle setup

pages.title: Pool Master
pages.description:
Aim precise cue shots to pocket balls using spin and angle adjustments in a classic pool table setting. Players navigate shot power and cue positioning to clear the table efficiently while competing in timed rounds that increase in difficulty. The game combines traditional billiards mechanics with progressive shot challenges suited for casual players and teens.  

Key Features

• Spin and angle shot control  
• Power gauge for cue strikes  
• Timed level progression system  
• Practice and challenge modes  
• Classic pool table visuals

pages.title: Pool Merge Mania
pages.description:
Combine matching pool balls to clear levels in this color-matching puzzle game where merging mechanics drive the gameplay. Players strategically merge balls on a grid to create higher-value orbs, aiming to reach target scores before running out of moves. Puzzles increase in complexity with new ball types and limited moves to challenge casual players and kids alike.

Key Features

• Ball merging grid system  
• Drag and drop merge controls  
• Increasing puzzle difficulty levels  
• Limited move challenge mode  
• Color-coded orb progression

pages.title: Pool 8
pages.description:
Strike precise shots to pocket balls in this classic cue sport challenge. The game follows standard eight-ball rules where players aim to clear their assigned group of balls before sinking the eight ball to win. Utilizing realistic physics, each shot requires careful planning and control, testing your precision and strategic thinking on a digital pool table.

Key Features

• Accurate cue ball aiming system  
• Intuitive mouse drag shot controls  
• Turn-based multiplayer gameplay  
• Standard eight-ball rule set  
• Realistic ball collision physics

pages.title: Lady Pool
pages.description:
Pocket cue control directs precise shots on a compact virtual pool table where angle and power adjustments challenge your accuracy. Players master shot calibration using swipe gestures to pocket balls against time constraints or preset puzzle layouts. The game blends classic pool elements with digital touch mechanics, aiming to clear tables efficiently while honing aim precision in varied casual matches.

Key Features

• Swipe gesture shot calibration  
• Adjustable cue power and angle  
• Progressive puzzle style levels  
• Time attack and casual modes  
• Compact virtual pool table setup

pages.title: Pool Master 3D
pages.description:
Aim and strike billiard balls using precise 3D cue control to pocket opponents' balls across varied table layouts. Players adjust shot power and angle with realistic spin effects to outplay AI challengers or friends. Progression unlocks trick shots and new tables with increasing difficulty in this casual indoor pool setting.
